description: SGLang serving Qwen3.6-27B on AMD R9700 (gfx1201) — DeltaNet-hybrid attention+mamba

panels.description: Requests currently executing in the SGLang scheduler.
panels.title: Running Reqs

panels.description: Requests waiting in the scheduler queue.
panels.title: Queue Reqs

panels.description: Live generation throughput reported by SGLang (tok/s).
panels.title: Gen Throughput (tok/s)

panels.description: Prefix-cache hit share of prompt tokens over the dashboard time range, derived from token counters (the engine's cache_hit_rate gauge is always 0 on the unified engine).
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: R9700 busy % from the DRM exporter on control-1 (the engine's sglang:utilization gauge is always 0 on this build).
panels.title: GPU Utilization

panels.description: GPU KV pool utilization. Sustained >85% risks retraction storms.
panels.title: KV Pool Usage

panels.description: Running vs queued requests over time. Queue > 0 for sustained periods = throughput saturation.
panels.title: Scheduler State

panels.description: R9700 engine busy % (DRM exporter): gpu = compute, mem = memory controller, vcn = video encode (co-resident VAAPI transcoders).
panels.title: GPU Engine Utilization (HW)

panels.description: Prefill-compute vs cache-hit vs decode token rates. Idle periods are blanked (> 0) so legend means reflect active load.
panels.title: Token Throughput by Mode (tok/s, stacked)

panels.description: Prompt token length distribution (p50/p90/p99). Large p99 = occasional very long prompts that dominate prefill time.
panels.title: Prompt Length Distribution (tokens)

panels.description: Time to first token — dominated by queue + prefill time.
panels.title: Time to First Token (p50/p90/p99)

panels.description: End-to-end request latency (queue + prefill + decode).
panels.title: E2E Request Latency (p50/p90/p99)

panels.description: Time requests spend waiting in the scheduler queue before prefill begins. Sustained high queue time = engine saturated.
panels.title: Queue Wait Time (p50/p90/p99)

panels.description: Per-stage breakdown of request latency (prefill, decode, etc). Identifies which pipeline stage dominates.
panels.title: Per-Stage Latency (p50/p90)

panels.description: KV attention pool, full-attention pool, and mamba SSM state pool utilization (0-100%). Mamba slots cap concurrency for DeltaNet layers.
panels.title: Pool Utilization (KV / Full-Attn / Mamba)

panels.description: KV pool slot counts: used, available (free), and evictable (can be freed by evicting cached prefixes). All in tokens.
panels.title: KV Pool Tokens (used / available / evictable)

panels.description: Mamba SSM state slots: used vs available. When mamba_used approaches max, new requests stall even if KV headroom remains — this is the DeltaNet concurrency ceiling.
panels.title: Mamba SSM Slots (concurrency gate)

panels.description: Retracted requests (aborted mid-generation) and paused requests (temporarily suspended). Elevated values signal backpressure.
panels.title: Retracted & Paused Requests

panels.description: Request arrival rate derived from the total request counter.
panels.title: Request Rate (req/s)

panels.description: Scheduler new-token ratio: fraction of batch tokens that are new decode tokens vs prefill tokens. Near 1.0 = pure decode batch. Near 0 = prefill-heavy.
panels.title: New Token Ratio (decode vs prefill mix)

panels.description: Cache-hit share of prefill tokens, derived from counters (the cache_hit_rate gauge is dead). Gaps = no prefill activity.
panels.title: Cache Hit Rate Over Time

panels.description: Pinned host-RAM cache pool (tokens). Sitting at 100% full is normal LRU steady state, not a problem.
panels.title: HiCache Host Pool (tokens)

panels.description: Where cache hits are served from, plus host-tier churn. load-back = host→GPU restores (~ms) replacing 100K-token re-prefills. Idle blanked (> 0).
panels.title: Cache Traffic (tok/s)

panels.description: VRAM used vs total. R9700 has 32 GiB; at --mem-fraction 0.875 SGLang reserves ~28 GiB (weights + KV pool + mamba state).
panels.title: VRAM

panels.description: GPU temperature, Celsius. R9700 throttles at ~110°C junction.
panels.title: GPU Temperature

title: SGLang
